popularStory.headline: Huis van Limburg
popularStory.description: Het graafschap en vanaf 1101 hertogdom Limburg ontstond bij het uiteenvallen van het hertogdom Neder-Lotharingen in de 10e en 11e eeuw. Het omvatte voornamelijk het land van Eupen. De eerste bekende h …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hendrik III van Limburg於大約1140年出生在荷蘭利包格可可拉德時，他的父親Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen29歲，母親Mathilde von Saffenberg36歲。他於1165年與Sophie von Saarbrücken在荷蘭利包格可可拉德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1221年6月21日在荷蘭利包格可可拉德洛勒度可享年82歲，埋葬在荷蘭利包格可可拉德洛勒度可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hendrik III van Limburg于大约1140年出生在荷兰利包格可可拉德时，他的父亲Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen29岁，母亲Mathilde von Saffenberg36岁。他于1165年与Sophie von Saarbrücken在荷兰利包格可可拉德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1221年6月21日在荷兰利包格可可拉德洛勒度可享年82岁，埋葬在荷兰利包格可可拉德洛勒度可。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Limburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, the largest being in Hesse.

Dutch (also Van Limburg): habitational name for someone from the province of Limburg or from several places so named, like Limburg in the Belgian province of Liège or from Limbourg in Haut-Rhin, France, all named with the ancient Germanic elements lindo ‘lime tree’ or ‘dragon’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

nameMeanings.name: Hendrik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Hendrik III van Limburg was born about 1140, in Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands, his father, Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen, was 29 and his mother, Mathilde von Saffenberg, was 36. He married Sophie von Saarbrücken in 1165, in Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 June 1221, in Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands, at the age of 82, and was buried in Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hendrik III van Limburg est né environ 1140, à Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas, son père, Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Saffenberg, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Sophie von Saarbrücken en 1165, à Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 juin 1221, à Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hendrik III van Limburg um 1140 in Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen 29 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Saffenberg 36. Er hat 1165 in Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande Sophie von Saarbrücken geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Juni 1221 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande und wurde in Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik III van Limburg è nato il circa 1140 nel Kerkrade, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Saffenberg, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Sophie von Saarbrücken nel 1165, nel Kerkrade, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 giugno 1221, nel Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Hendrik III van Limburgが約1140年にオランダリンブルグケルクラドで生まれた時，父Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlenは29歳，母Mathilde von Saffenbergは36歳であった。1165年にオランダリンブルグケルクラドでSophie von Saarbrückenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1221年6月21日にオランダリンブルグケルクラドロルドウックで82歳で死去し，オランダリンブルグケルクラドロルドウックにて埋葬された。

ko.Limburg, Duché de Limburg, Holy Roman Em: 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 커프u르스투 트리어 림버그 (라h)
ko.lifeSummary: Hendrik III van Limburg(이)가 대략 1140년 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Saffenberg(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1165년 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드에서 Sophie von Saarbrücken(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1221년 6월 21일 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드 롤드크에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드 롤드크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik III van Limburg nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Kerkrade, Limburgo, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Saffenberg, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Sophie von Saarbrücken em 1165, em Kerkrade, Limburgo, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de junho de 1221, em Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburgo, Países Baixos, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburgo, Países Baixos.

ru.Limburg, Duché de Limburg, Holy Roman Em: лимбург (лахн), курфuрстентум триир, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hendrik III van Limburg родился около 1140 г. в местности киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Saffenberg, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Sophie von Saarbrücken в 1165 г. в местности киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 июня 1221 г. в местности ролдук, киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности ролдук, киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды.

Se casó con Sophie von Saarbrücken en 1165, en Kerkrade, Limburg, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de junio de 1221, en Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Países Bajos, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Países Bajos.
